name: Cajun Style Chicken Nuggets
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds boned and skinned chicken breast halves, cut into 1 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the onion soup mix, bread crumbs, chili powder, cumin, red pepper flakes, and thyme in a large bowl.
2. Dip each piece of chicken into the mixture, ensuring it is well-coated on all sides.
3. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 350°F (175°C).
4. Carefully lower the coated chicken pieces into the hot oil using tongs or a slotted spoon.
5. Turn the pieces once halfway through frying to ensure even cooking.
6. Fry until golden brown and crispy, about 10-12 minutes total.
7. Remove the nuggets with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
8. Serve hot. Makes approximately 5 dozen nuggets.
